'''Romar''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Galov sector/Legends|Galov sector]]. It was home to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Antoll Jellrek]]'s base.

{{Planet-stub}}
